Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Sep-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer
Appearances:
Charles Tillage, Esq. for Plaintiffs Greg Clark, Dan T. McKittrick, Lynette McKittrick, Mildred McKittrick, Terrence R. Judd, Collean, W. Judd, Robert M. Sevy, Thomas B. Cardon, Suzette Cardon, Blaine H. Johnson, Loa M. Johnson, Mountain West Office Supply and Bookstore, Inc., Kaela Porter, Liberty Trust, Youth Empowerment.
No appearances by Defendants.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs and against the defendants Frank Venuti, Reliance Holding Co., Escalante Natural History Association.
Plaintiffs' counsel to submit a proposed judgment to the Court with pre-judgment interest, leave punitive damages line blank and add a section for total damages.
The matter is taken under submission.
